seasonal_strength.definition: How strongly dealer hedging is suppressing volatility right now.

price_threshold.definition: The price level above which dealer hedging flips and volatility could expand.

positioning_pulse.definition: Whether trend-following funds are positioned to buy or sell.

seasonal_bands.definition: The upper and lower price levels where the market is likely to trade.

seasonal_catalyst.definition: Upcoming economic events that could spike volatility; which direction has the IV edge.

seasonal_tone.definition: How many stocks are above their moving averages; signals if the market is healthy or overextended.

seasonal_momentum.definition: Which sectors are leading and which are lagging; where volatility edges are.
